claim: Positive 0DTE VRP exists but is economically small (~0.001% of spot at 10:00 ET)
Individual OTM option returns are highly volatile and often not statistically distinguishable from zero
Strategy PNL distributions are wide and tail-heavy; no strategy is risk-free
After execution costs (half-spread + 0.5bp), most strategies have poor mean-to-tail ratios
ES(1%) values range 0.58-1.58% of underlying; worst-day outcomes severe
Pre/post 2022 PNL sign changes exist but are statistically weak under date clustering
Realized skewness is a stronger PNL driver than realized variance for most strategies
Moment-PNL relationships survive Benjamini-Hochberg multiple-testing correction
VIX regime heterogeneity: downside structures earn more in high-VIX
Binary direction prediction dominates return magnitude prediction for OOS trading
Put ratio spreads reach SR 1.26, iron butterflies 0.82 under strict OOS
Top-3 by SR basket reaches SR 1.27; all-strategies basket reaches 1.01
0DTE is better viewed as a tightly risk-budgeted tactical overlay, not standing carry
